message:
chore(deps): Update Cargo.lock

Sync lock file with dependency changes from recent feature additions.

Changes reflect:
- Dependencies for new Aider connector functionality
- Any transitive dependency updates from cargo resolver

Lock file update ensures reproducible builds across environments.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
